title: Make admin page clearly accessible from the UI

requirements.summary: Add a discreet admin access link in the site footer that navigates to /admin
acceptanceCriteria: A link labeled 'Admin' (or equivalent) is visible in the site footer on all pages.
Clicking the admin link navigates the user to the /admin route.
The ProtectedAdminRoute renders the AdminLoginForm when the user is not authenticated.
The admin link is visually unobtrusive (small, muted styling) so it does not distract regular customers.
The link is present on both desktop and mobile layouts.

file_operations.description: Add an admin link to the footer section with discreet styling (small text, muted color) that navigates to /admin route using React Router Link component. Position the link in the footer alongside existing Cleanio branding text, ensuring it remains unobtrusive and does not interfere with the main customer experience. The link must be visible on both desktop and mobile layouts.
